fairies.name: Great Fairy of Magic
fairies.location: Fairy Fountain on the west side of North Clock Town. Restored with the single Stray Fairy hidden in Clock Town (1 Stray Fairy) — it floats in the Laundry Pool during the day and near the Stock Pot Inn in East Clock Town at night.
fairies.cost: GRANTS Magic Power (the magic meter itself) the first time she is restored as Deku Link, enabling magic-based abilities (e.g. the Deku bubble shot). Then, if you return to her in human/Hylian form, she gives the Great Fairy's Mask — a mask that chimes and glows when a Stray Fairy is in the same room, used to help locate the 15 Stray Fairies in each temple.

fairies.name: Great Fairy (Woodfall)
fairies.location: Fairy Fountain in Woodfall, in a grotto near Woodfall Temple. Restored by returning all 15 Stray Fairies from Woodfall Temple.
fairies.cost: GRANTS the Great Spin Attack — an enhanced sword Spin Attack with double the power and range of the normal Spin Attack.

fairies.name: Great Fairy (Snowhead)
fairies.location: Fairy Fountain at Snowhead, near the entrance to Snowhead Temple. Restored by returning all 15 Stray Fairies from Snowhead Temple.
fairies.cost: GRANTS Double Magic Power — an extended magic meter that doubles Link's magic capacity (the larger/double magic gauge).

fairies.name: Great Fairy (Great Bay)
fairies.location: Fairy Fountain in the Great Bay region near Zora Cape. Restored by returning all 15 Stray Fairies from Great Bay Temple.
fairies.cost: GRANTS Double Defense (Enhanced Defense) — halves the amount of damage Link takes from all damage sources.

fairies.name: Great Fairy (Stone Tower)
fairies.location: Fairy Fountain in Ikana Canyon, near Stone Tower. Restored by returning all 15 Stray Fairies from Stone Tower Temple.
fairies.cost: GRANTS the Great Fairy's Sword — the strongest sword in the game, a magical two-handed sword equipped to a C-button item slot.
